ingredients: Ingredients: reconstituted skimmed milk 32.5%, milky coating 31% (sugar, skimmed milk powder, vegetable fats and oil, anhydrous milkfat (milk), emulsifiers: lecithins (soy), flavouring), milk chocolate 10% (sugar, cocoa butter, skimmed milk powder, cocoa mass, anhydrous milkfat (milk), emulsifiers: lecithins (soy), flavouring), pasteurized cream (milk) 8.5%, sugar, skimmed milk powder 4%, glucose syrup, butter (milk), emulsifiers: mono and diglycerides of fatty acids, lecithins (soy), stabilizers (locust bean gum, guar gum, carrageenan), flavouring. Total milk constituents: 26.5%. Total cocoa constituents: 4%.
long_description:
Get ready for smiles and shouts of joy! Your favourite Kinder chocolate is now an irresistible ice cream - introducing the new Kinder Ice Cream! This isn't just any ice cream; it's a perfectly sized kids' ice cream designed for little hands and big imaginations. Parents, you'll love that it's a delightful snack that brings the beloved Kinder taste into a refreshing frozen treat.

Imagine: a soft, refreshing milk ice cream at its heart, wrapped in a deliciously smooth double-layer Kinder Chocolate coating. All this in the iconic Kinder drop shape, making it super fun for kids to hold and eat! It's the perfect kids' treat for a hot Australian summer day, a well-deserved after-school snack, or a fun addition to any family moment. Say goodbye to messy melting and hello to pure ice cream happiness!
  • SIGNATURE KINDER CHOCOLATE COATING: Experience the unmistakable taste of Kinder chocolate in a delightful, rich, double-layered shell that encases the creamy ice cream. It's the taste kids adore and parents trust!

  • SOFT & REFRESHING MILK ICE CREAM: Inside, discover a smooth and creamy milk ice cream that is light, refreshing, and simply melts in your mouth - the perfect cool-down treat for any time of year.

  • ICONIC KINDER DROP SHAPE: The unique and playful Kinder drop shape makes this ice cream instantly recognizable and easy for kids to hold, minimizing mess and maximizing enjoyment!

  • PERFECT KID'S TREAT & SNACK: Each Kinder Ice Cream is perfectly portioned for a satisfying kids' snack or a delightful dessert. It's the ideal way to bring a little bit of magic to their day without over-indulging.

  • FAMILY-FRIENDLY FUN: Ideal for playdates, after-school rewards, or simply cooling off during summer holidays, this ice cream is a fantastic family treat that everyone will love.

ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients (reconstituted buttermilk milk and/or reconstituted skim milk, cream milk, milk solids), sugar, cocoa components (11%) (cocoa mass^, cocoa butter^), glucose, vegetable oil, emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, lecithin soy, sunflower and/or rapeseed), stabilisers (locust bean gum, guar gum, carrageenan, tara gum), flavours, colours (sodium copper cholorophyllin, annatto), pea protein, salt, maltodextrin, gluco fibre.
long_description:
Discover Magnum Peppermint Ice Cream Sticks: an irresistibly cool dessert featuring smooth peppermint-flavoured ice cream covered in thick, cracking Magnum chocolate. The premium chocolate coating, made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance, and the velvety peppermint ice cream interior work in harmony to give you the perfect balance of texture and taste. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to ensure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's all about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers worldwide have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Classic and Almond to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Have you tried the other Magnum ranges? Indulge in a tasty snack with Magnum Mini ice cream. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Finally, our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Which ice cream will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself, and be #TrueToPleasure.
  • Magnum Peppermint Ice Cream Sticks - experience the true pleasure and superior taste of velvety smooth ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum chocolate

  • Smooth peppermint ice cream coated in thick, cracking chocolate, these ice cream sticks are made from the highest quality ingredients by expert hands with passion and precision

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium chocolate and ice cream - the essential Magnum experience

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream is flavoured with peppermint - may contain wheat, gluten, peanut and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 4 Magnum Peppermint ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

  • ^Rainforest Alliance Certified. Find out more at ra.org..

long_description:
Indulge in the delicious Dulce De Leche Biscuit Caramel Magnum Mini that satisfies your cravings. This delicious snack features creamy caramel ice cream blended with golden caramel and is coated in Magnum's signature cracking chocolate. Magnum's blend of the finest chocolate and caramel flavours offers a truly satisfying experience. The cocoa beans utilised by Magnum for their frozen chocolate dessert are of the highest quality and are carefully selected by Rainforest Alliance-certified farmers. We are committed to sourcing our cocoa beans responsibly and ensuring sustainability throughout the process. Every step, from sourcing to producing ice creams, sticks, and tubs, is a testament to our dedication to quality and sustainability, guaranteeing the best chocolate quality in every flavour. Since 1989, Magnum has provided pleasure seekers worldwide with thick chocolate and smooth ice cream that strikes the perfect balance. This treat is ideal for families looking for a delectable and indulgent snack. We believe that genuine pleasure comes from experiencing everything to the fullest. With our wide range of flavours, including Classic, Almond, White, Strawberry, Double Chocolate, Raspberry, and our selection of tubs, there is something for everyone. Discover more Magnum frozen treats on our website and find the one that satisfies your cravings. Let yourself be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Magnum Mini Dulce De Leche Ice Cream Sticks, tasty and creamy caramel ice cream coated in thick Magnum milk chocolate and cookie pieces

  • Ice cream with caramel flavoured swirls - a luscious and indulgent treat that combines the rich creaminess of ice cream with the irresistible sweetness of caramel

  • The perfect balance of golden caramel swirls, thick Magnum milk chocolate coating and cookie pieces - all to satisfy those seeking pure pleasure

  • Enjoy Rainforest Alliance-certified Magnum chocolate dessert ice cream, available in classic and unique flavours for the whole family to savour

  • Our Magnum chocolate dessert uses sustainably grown cocoa beans for an exceptional chocolate experience

  • Pack contains 6 Magnum Honeycomb ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

We mix them into our decadent caramel sauce and whip generously through rich caramel flavoured ice cream. It's then locked away inside a layer of premium milk chocolate and macadamias. We think the salt flakes are happier here.

- Connoisseur. Thrill Your Senses

ingredients: RECONSTITUTED SKIM MILK, SUCROSE, WHEAT FLOUR, VEGETABLE FAT, SKIMMED MILK POWDER, VEGETABLE OIL, HAZELNUT PASTE (6%) WHOLE MILK POWDER, GLUCOSE SYRUP, FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER (1%), EMULSIFIERS (LECITHIN (SOY), MONO AND DIGLYCERIDES OF FATTY ACIDS), STABILIZERS (LOCUST BEAN GUM, GUAR GUM, CARRAGEENAN), FLAVOURINGS, SALT, WHEAT STARCH, MILK PROTEINS, RAISING AGENT (AMMONIUM HYDROGEN CARBONATE).
long_description:
Kinder Bueno White Chocolate Ice Cream Cones - A White Chocolate Dream!

Prepare to be enchanted by your favorite Kinder Bueno chocolate bar in a whole new, delightful way! Introducing the new Kinder Bueno White Chocolate Frozen Dessert Cone, an exquisitely indulgent ice cream treat that delivers the creamy, unique taste of white Kinder Bueno to the frozen dessert aisle. Each ice cream cone is a symphony of delicate flavors and textures, crafted to provide a moment of pure bliss with every single bite. Perfect for a refreshing and luxurious twist on a beloved classic, these ice cream cones are an absolute must-try for any ice cream enthusiast, especially those who adore white chocolate! Try the ultimate ice cream cone sensation with Kinder Bueno White Chocolate Frozen Dessert Cones today!
  • SMOOTH WHITE HAZELNUT CREAM FILLING: Immerse yourself in a rich, velvety smooth white hazelnut ice cream filling that perfectly captures the signature creamy Kinder Bueno White taste you adore.

  • DELICIOUS WHITE HAZELNUT DISK & CRISPY SPRINKLES: Each cone is crowned with a delectable white hazelnut disk and crunchy cocoa sprinkles, adding an irresistible layer of texture and flavour to your frozen dessert.

  • CRISPY WAFER CONE: Savor the satisfying crunch of a perfectly crispy wafer cone, offering the ideal textural contrast to the smooth and creamy ice cream within.

  • UNIQUE WHITE HAZELNUT & COCOA TIP: Discover a delightful white hazelnut and cocoa tip at the very bottom of every ice cream cone, ensuring a truly satisfying and flavourful grand finale to your ice cream experience.

  • PERFECT FOR SHARING: Each pack contains 4 delicious ice cream cones, making them ideal for sharing with friends and family during gatherings, parties, or simply when you want to share a moment of ice cream bliss.

description: STREETS PADDLE POP TWISTER MINI PINEAPPLE ICE BLOCK STICKS 6PK 300ML
ingredients: Water, reconstituted fruit juice (12%) (lemon, strawberry, pineapple), sugar, glucose, fructose, maltodextrin, vegetable oil, stabilisers (guar gum, locust bean gum, tara gum), flavours, colours (black carrot, safflower and beetroot juice concentrates, chlorophyll, turmeric), pea protein, food acid (citric), emulsifier (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids), sea salt.
long_description:
Step into a world of excitement and fun with Paddle Pop Mini Twister, a delicious ice confection combining smooth, plant-based pineapple ice cream with the refreshing flavours of strawberry, lemon and lime fruit ice. Made with fruit juice and no artificial colours or flavours, it's a frozen dessert with a twist kids can enjoy.

At Paddle Pop, we believe in wholesome childhood fun! Our mission is to craft great ice cream that empowers parents and caregivers to make better choices while bringing happiness, joy and excitement to their kids.

As part of our 'Responsibly Made for Kids' promise, Paddle Pop Mini Twister is a fun and tasty treat that meets our nutritional criteria for children's ice cream. We have set strict nutrition criteria for all of our kids' ice creams to reassure parents that our entire kids' range will contain no more than 110 calories, a maximum of 12 grams of sugar and 3 grams of saturated fat per portion. Head on over to our website to find out more information on Streets' commitment to nutrition, and discover our full range of products. With brands like Paddle Pop, Magnum, Cornetto and Calippo, there's something for everyone to enjoy.
  • Bring joy to your day with Paddle Pop Twister Mini Pineapple Ice Confection, a refreshing ice confection kids will love

  • A frozen dessert like no other, made with fruit juice to deliver a delightful burst of natural flavours

  • Enjoy the smooth, plant-based pineapple ice cream, twisted with refreshing strawberry, lemon and lime flavour fruit ice

  • Responsibly made for kids, Paddle Pop Mini Twister contains no artificial colours or flavours

  • Our fruit ice confection is a fun snack that brings joy and togetherness in every bite

  • This frozen dessert comes in a convenient pack of 6, perfect for sharing or keeping in the freezer - store at -18C for a sweet fix anytime.

ingredients: Dairy ingredients [reconstituted buttermilk (milk) and/or reconstituted skim milk, milk solids, butter oil (milk), cream (milk)], sugar, vegetable oil, glucose syrup, wheat flour, gelatine, emulsifiers (471, soy lecithin, 476), cocoa powder, malt extract (from barley), flavours, raising agent (500), salt, colours (161b, 160b, 120), vegetable gums (401, 410, 407, 412, 417). Broken sticks rarely occur but may cause a choking or injury risk.
long_description:
Streets Golden Gaytime Strawberries & Cream delivers a unique pink twist on the classic ice cream loved by Australians for generations. Enjoy the multilayered sensation of strawberries and cream, coated in chocolate, covered with pink biscuit crumbs. Our convenient multipack makes it easy to share a Gaytime with family and friends. Store at -18C to enjoy whenever you're craving a sweet fix. Between World War I and World War II, Edwin ('Ted') Street, together with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice creams were originally made in Ted Streets' backyard shed and sold to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then later a one-horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. The business continued to grow, and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. It's the choices we make that bring the happiest difference. We're Streets ice cream, we know all about happy choices - choose your Streets ice cream to turn an average moment into something great!
  • Streets Golden Gaytime Strawberries & Cream brings a unique pink twist to Australia's favourite ice cream

  • Enjoy the delicious flavour of strawberries and cream, coated in a thin layer of chocolate and pink Gaytime biscuit crumbs

  • Streets Golden Gaytime Strawberries & Cream is proudly Australian made

  • A multilayered taste experience, combining our iconic biscuit crumb layer with the fun and exciting flavours of strawberries and cream

  • This convenient multipack makes it easy to enjoy a Gaytime with family and friends

  • Store these frozen dessert sticks at -18C for anytime you're craving some Gaytime goodness.

long_description:
Eight delicious Banana Paddle Pop ice creams for the family to enjoy. Made with wholesome dairy milk and containing no artificial colours or flavours. Go bananas and check it out now! Give it to the kids or take a trip down memory lane for a taste of nostalgia. A refreshing treat for hot days or the perfect snack all the time, treat yourself to a Paddle Pop today! Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street with the help of his wife and brother laid the foundations (in Corrimal, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice cream was originally made in the back shed by Ted Street. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then a one horsepower motorbike, to sell Streets ice cream. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Viennetta, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Visit our Streets website to find our full range of products including water ice, ice cream, and so much more
  • Bite into the brilliant banana flavoured dessert today!

  • Ice cream is made with Australian or New Zealand dairy.

  • No Artificial Flavours in this Paddle Pop treat!

  • Delicious source of Calcium

  • Made responsibly for kids, so that kids can enjoy a delicious treat. Available in a pack of 8 to share with friends and family,.

  • Treat yourself and try one today.

description: BINGGRAE MELONA ICE BAR MANGO 4 PACK 280ML
ingredients: Water, sugar, corn syrup, coconut oil, mango puree 2.9%, rice syrup solids, bulking agent: (E1200), waxy corn starch, flavouring, emulsifiers: (E410; E471; E433; E407), stabilizers: (E466; E412), salt, colours: (E162; E100).
long_description:
Melona is Koreas No.1 ice cream bar, having gained immerse popularity since its launch in 1992. It has captured the hearts of people across the country and become a beloved national ice cream brand. Melona's popularity can be attributed to its unique combination of a sweet and creamy taste infused with the essence of fresh flavor. The ice cream delivers a delightful and authentic fruit based flavor that is both refreshing and satisfying. Each bite is a creamy and smooth experience, as Melona's texture is designed to melt in your mouth.

Melona Mango offers a tropical indulgence with the rich, juicy flavor of ripe mangoes. This flavor pairs the creaminess of Melona's signature ice cream with the natural sweetness of mango for a vibrant, refreshing treat. Its bright, golden color mirrors the authentic mango experience, making it an excellent choice for those who love a burst of tropical flavor in their frozen treats.
name: Melona Ice Bar Mango 4 Pack

ingredients: White Chocolate Coating (27%) [Sugar, Cocoa Solids, Milk Solids, Vegetable Oil, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin, 476, 442), Natural Flavour], Dairy Ingredients (Cream and/or Milk Fat, Reconstituted Skim Milk, Milk Solids), Water, Sugar, Macadamias (9.8%), Mango & Passionfruit Ripple (7%) [Sugar, Mango Puree (23%) (Food Acid (330), Antioxidant (300)) Glucose Syrup, Water, Passionfruit Juice (7%), Thickeners (1442, 407), Food Acid (330, 331), Natural Flavour, Colour (160a)], White Choc Chips (5%) [Sugar, Vegetable Fat, Milk Solids, Emulsifiers (Soy Lecithin-322), Natural Flavour], Biscuit Crumb (3%) [Wheat, Sugar, Vegetable Oil (Antioxident (307)), Glucose Syrup, Malt Extract (Barley), Raising Agent (Sodium Bicarbonate), Salt], Emulsifier (471), Vegetable Gums (410, 412), Natural Flavour, Natural Colour (Carotene).
long_description:
Here's to Byron Bay: our home and muse since 1895. The natural, beauty & purity of this region is why our ice cream is creamier, bountiful and more crave-worthy—and why you can taste hints of the hinterland, sea breezes and sun-drenched beaches in every blissful bite.

Inspired by the generosity of this coastline, our flavours brim with decadent textures, swirls and clusters that complement our heavenly ice cream. Crafted with our famous milk and cream from local farms, every scoop is an invitation to join us in paradise.
  • 100% Australian farmer owned

  • Indulgently chunky ice cream

  • Made with fresh milk & cream

country_of_origin: MADE IN AUSTRALIA
description: MAGNUM MINI WHITE CHOC 6PK 360ML
ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients reconstituted buttermilk (milk) and/or reconstituted skim milk, butter oil (milk) cream (milk), milk solids, sugar, cocoa butter^ (8%), glucose, vegetable oil, emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, sunflower lecithin and/or rapeseed lecithin, polyglycerol polyricinoleate), stabilisers (guar gum, locust bean gum, tara gum, carrageenan), natural vanilla, colour (annatto), flavours, pea protein, salt, maltodextrin, gluco fibre.
long_description:
Discover Magnum Mini White Ice Cream Sticks and enjoy a mini take on the original White. With Magnum White Ice Cream Sticks, experience the rich, cracking white chocolate and velvety smooth vanilla ice cream any pleasure seeker will adore. Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this indulgent ice cream is coated in creamy white chocolate made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - a winning combination for pleasure seekers and chocolate ice cream lovers. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Almond and White to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Searching for a vegan alternative? Our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Magnum Mini White Ice Cream Stick - experience the true pleasure and superior taste of velvety smooth ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum white chocolate.

  • These mini vanilla ice creams are coated with rich Magnum white chocolate for a superior taste and texture

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between chocolate and ice cream in a mini size - for indulgence any time

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream features smooth velvety vanilla - may contain wheat, gluten, soy, peanut and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 6 Magnum Mini White ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

long_description:
Goodbye serious, hello joy! Refresh yourself with Streets Calippo Supermix Ice Confection, featuring new Calippo flavours in a bigger tube. Pick from Cola, Strawberry, Orange or Lime flavours, there is a choice for everyone! Bursting with juicy freshness, Calippo is made with fruit juice and is 99% fat free. Available in a 5 pack, these ice blocks are easy to share with family and friends on a hot day or as a fun snack anytime. Store at -18C to enjoy whenever you're craving a sweet fix. Between World War I and World War II, Edwin ('Ted') Street, together with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice creams were originally made in Ted Streets' backyard shed and sold to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then later a one-horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. The business continued to grow, and today, Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand. Choose happier together with Streets.

  • Bring back that summer feeling by refreshing yourself with Streets Calippo Supermix!

  • Featuring new Calippo flavours in a bigger tube - Cola, Strawberry, Orange and Lime.

  • Made with fruit juice to deliver a delightful punch of flavour.

  • Available in a multipack of 5, our ice blocks are perfect for sharing or keeping in the freezer.

  • Calippo is vegan friendly and 99% fat free.

  • Store these ice blocks at -18C for anytime you're craving a sweet treat..
name: Calippo Super Mix Ice Blocks 5 Pack

The refreshing blend of exotic taste and exciting textures of a Raffaello, now brought together into a unique premium frozen creation. Discover the taste of Raffaello as an extraordinarily indulgent and refined frozen creation. Frozen dessert multipack containing four Raffaello Frozen Dessert sticks, to be stored at -18C. Find them in the ice cream freezer.
  • QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Raffaello's renowned expertise is used to select ingredients with the utmost care while never compromising on quality.
  • TASTE: Experience an unfolding discovery of harmonious tastes & textures, that can deliver a unique indulgent and refreshing journey to be relished bite after bite.
  • INDULGENT: Perfect for a moment of indulgent relaxation, shared with your close ones or for a me moment.
  • MORE TO TASTE: Discover Ferrero Rondnoir frozen dessert with the special touch of dark chocolate coating or Ferrero Rocher Classic Frozen Dessert with a crunchy shell of delicious milk chocolate.

long_description:
Melona is Koreas No.1 ice cream bar, having gained immerse popularity since its launch in 1992. It has captured the hearts of people across the country and become a beloved national ice cream brand. Melona's popularity can be attributed to its unique combination of a sweet and creamy taste infused with the essence of fresh flavor. The ice cream delivers a delightful and authentic fruit based flavor that is both refreshing and satisfying. Each bite is a creamy and smooth experience, as Melona's texture is designed to melt in your mouth.

Melon is The iconic flavor that started it all, Melona Melon is renowned for its smooth, creamy texture and refreshing honeydew melon taste. Its distinct light-green color and natural sweetness make it a favorite among ice cream lovers worldwide. Perfect for those seeking a refreshing, fruity treat thats not overly sweet, Melona Melon delivers a light, tropical taste that captures the essence of summer.
name: Melona Ice Bar Melon 4 Pack

long_description:
Made with real Aussie mangoes and dairy, Weis Mango Fruit & Ice Cream Bars create a perfect summer escape at any time of the year. One bite of our traditional creamy strip, partnered with real fruit for an authentic and natural taste, and you've got heaven in a Weis Bar.

Our signature two-toned ice cream snack offers an irresistible indulgence - all wrapped up in a no-stick, no-drip package to perfectly capture a tonne of sunshine in every bite! Better still, this cool and creamy goodness is a delicious source of calcium, made right here in Australia with real Aussie dairy. Weis bars contain no artificial colours or flavours and are gluten free, so you can enjoy every bite.

Look out for our colourful multipacks in your supermarket's freezer section, making it easy to share this summer favourite with family and friends. Our knowledge and expertise in sourcing and working with all different kinds of fruits, premium-grade nuts and natural ingredients enable us to create unique combinations and taste experiences that will have your taste buds doing a happy little dance. Be sure to also try our Weis Macadamia, Mango & Ice Cream bars, which include macadamias for that extra little bit of crunch.
  • Made with real Aussie mangoes, Weis Mango Fruit & Ice Cream Bars are a summer favourite!

  • Weis ice cream bars contain real Aussie dairy, making them a delicious source of calcium

  • Enjoy the refreshing taste of our two-tone ice cream bar - get your multipack today for the perfect sweet treat for a hot summer day or any occasion

  • We're proud of what goes into our ice cream - no artificial colours or flavours so you can enjoy every bite

  • This irresistibly indulgent snack is gluten free

  • Weis bars are made right here in Australia.

long_description:
Deliciously creamy caramel flavoured ice cream with decadent swirls throughout to enjoy in every bite. Coated in a thick shell of Magnum's signature chocolate topped with cookie pieces for the sweet harmony of taste and texture. Crafted with sustainably sourced cocoa beans, Magnum promises a high-quality chocolate experience.
  • Delciously creamy caramel flavoured ice cream with swirls of flavour through out, coated in cracking Magnum Chocolate and topped with cookie pieces for the perfect balance of caramel flavoured taste and texture.

  • Magnum uses sustainably grown cocoa beans for a high-quality signature chocolate experience that is Rainforest Alliance Certified.

  • Creamy ice cream combined with the sweet flavour of caramel and Magnum cracking chocolate makes for the perfect indulgent snack.

  • The pack contains 4 Dulce De Leche Magnum ice creams

  • For the same indulgent Dulce De Leche flavour in a smaller size, try Dulce De Leche Mini 6 Pack

description: MAGNUM ICE CREAM WHITE 4PK 428 ML
ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients (reconstituted buttermilk milk and/or reconstituted skim milk, milk solids, cream milk), sugar, cocoa butter^ (7%), glucose, vegetable oil, emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, lecithin sunflower and/or rapeseed, polyglycerol polyricinoleate), stabilisers (locust bean gum, tara gum, guar gum, carrageenan), natural vanilla, flavours, colour (annatto), pea protein, salt, maltodextrin, gluco fibre.
long_description:
Here at Magnum, we believe that a day without pleasure is a day lost. With Magnum White Ice Cream Sticks, experience the rich, cracking white chocolate and velvety smooth vanilla ice cream any pleasure seeker will adore. Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this indulgent ice cream is coated in creamy white chocolate made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - a winning combination for pleasure seekers and chocolate ice cream lovers. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to ensure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's all about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers worldwide have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Classic and Almond to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Have you tried the other Magnum ranges? Indulge in a tasty snack with Magnum Mini ice cream. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Finally, our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Which ice cream will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself, and be #TrueToPleasure.
  • Magnum White Ice Cream Stick - experience the true pleasure and superior taste of velvety smooth ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum white chocolate

  • Smooth vanilla ice cream coated in rich white chocolate, these ice cream sticks are made from the highest quality ingredients by expert hands with passion and precision

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium chocolate and ice cream - the essential Magnum experience

  • The chocolate used in this ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream features smooth velvety vanilla - may contain wheat, gluten, soy, peanut and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 3 Magnum White ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

long_description:
Weis Mini Mango & Ice Cream Bars are made with real Aussie mangoes and dairy, making them the perfect summer escape at any time of the year. One bite of our delicious cream strip, together with real fruit for an authentic and natural taste, and you've got heaven in a Weis Bar.

Our signature two-toned ice cream snack is truly irresistible - all wrapped up in a no-stick, no-drip package to perfectly capture a tonne of sunshine in every bite! Better still, this cool and creamy goodness is a tasty source of calcium, made right here in Australia.

Weis bars contain no artificial colours or flavours and are gluten free, so you can enjoy every bite. These frozen desserts are a real summer favourite and perfect for hot days, treats or really any occasion. There's nothing quite like that real Weis flavour!

Our knowledge and expertise in sourcing and working with all different kinds of fruits, premium-grade nuts and natural ingredients enable us to create unique combinations and taste experiences that will have your taste buds doing a happy little dance. Be sure to also try our Weis Macadamia, Mango & Ice Cream bars, which include macadamias for that extra crunch.
  • Weis Mini Mango & Ice Cream Bars are made with real Aussie mangoes

  • Our two-tone bars also contain real Aussie dairy for a deliciously creamy flavour

  • Weis ice cream bars are perfect for a hot summer's day or just as a sweet treat

  • No artificial colours or flavours so you can enjoy every bite

  • Each ice cream bar is only 82 calories, making them a truly irresistible snack

  • Weis bars have been made right here in Australia since 1957.

description: STREETS GOLDEN GAYTIME TRADITIONAL STICKS 4 PACK 400ML
ingredients: Dairy ingredients [reconstituted skim milk and/or reconstituted buttermilk (milk), milk solids, cream (milk)], sugar, vegetable oil, wheat flour, glucose syrup, flavours, gelatine, cocoa powder, emulsifiers (471, soy lecithin, 476), raising agent (500), salt, colours (160b, 100, 120), malt extract (from barley), vegetable gums (401, 410, 412, 417, 407).
long_description:
An Aussie icon, get your hands on Streets Golden Gaytime Ice Cream Sticks now! Enjoy the multilayered sensation of creamy toffee and vanilla ice cream, dipped in chocolate and covered with crunchy biscuit crumbs. Our convenient multipack makes it easy to share a Gaytime with family and friends. After all, it's hard to have a Gaytime on your own! Store at -18C to enjoy whenever you're craving a sweet fix. Between World War I and World War II, Edwin ('Ted') Street, together with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice creams were originally made in Ted Streets' backyard shed and sold to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then later a one-horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. The business continued to grow, and today, Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. It's the choices we make that bring the happiest difference. We're Streets ice cream, we know all about happy choices - choose your Streets ice cream to turn an average moment into something great!
  • Streets Golden Gaytime Ice Cream Sticks, Australia's favourite ice cream!

  • Enjoy the delicious flavour of creamy toffee and vanilla, coated in a thin layer of chocolate and crunchy Gaytime biscuit crumbs

  • Streets Golden Gaytime Ice Cream is proudly Australian made

  • A multilayered taste experience, combining our iconic biscuit crumb layer with classic toffee and vanilla flavours

  • This convenient multipack makes it easy to enjoy a Gaytime with family and friends

  • Store these frozen dessert sticks at -18C for anytime you're craving some Gaytime goodness.

We mix them into our decadent caramel sauce and whip generously through rich caramel flavoured ice cream. It's then locked away inside a layer of premium milk chocolate and macadamias. We think the salt flakes are happier here.

long_description:
Say goodbye serious and hello joy! Calippo Mini's are delicious Orange Lime and Lemon flavoured water ice blocks in a mixed pack! Great for a refreshing treat at home, enjoy the mouthwatering fruit flavours in a mini block. Using real fruit juice as well as being 99% fat free, these are perfect for the family to share in a convenient multipack of 10. Enjoy the great juicy taste of Calippo, the taste you love and so refreshing. Calippo is perfect for our summer heat, an evening snack or an anytime treat. Streets Ice Cream was originally made in the back shed of our founder, Ted Street. Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street, thanks to his wife and brother, laid the foundations (in Cordial, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then a one horsepower motorbike, to sell Streets Ice Cream. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with brands such as Magnum, Viennetta, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Visit our Streets website to find our full range of products including water ice, ice cream, ice cream stick, ice cream tubs, kids ice cream, frozen dessert and so much more. Choose Happier Together.
  • Calippo is made with real fruit juice

  • Ice blocks that are 99% Fat Free!

  • Frozen and refreshing fruit flavoured mini snack treat.

  • Delicious Orange Lime and Lemon flavours

  • Delicious ice blocks in a multipack

  • A water ice for those summer days!.

long_description:
Say goodbye serious and hello happiness! Streets Splice Pine Lime is a delicious fruit ice confection. Available in a multipack, so get your 8 pack today! Using real fruit juice, this refreshing treat is perfect to cool down over Summer or anytime of the year. Splice is renowned for its pineapple & lime flavoured coating with a soft vanilla centre, not to mention that it's 97% fat free. An Aussie classic that is ideal to share with friends and family, or to treat yourself. Get your hands on a delicious and refreshing Streets Splice Pine-Lime today. Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street, thanks to his wife and brother, laid the foundations (in Corrimal, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice cream was originally made in the back shed by Ted Street. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then a one horsepower motorbike, to sell Streets ice cream. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Choose Happier Together.
  • Splice a refreshing fruit ice confection, so get the fruity feeling!

  • Splice delivers on a delicious Pine Lime flavour!

  • Splice contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • Made with real fruit juice, great for the whole family.

  • 97% fat free, makes a great refreshing treat.

  • Available in a multipack with 8 delicious sticks..

long_description:
Discover Magnum Mini Classic Ice Cream Sticks and enjoy a mini take on the original classic, made with velvety smooth vanilla ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum chocolate. Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this indulgent frozen dessert is coated in creamy milk chocolate made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - a winning combination for pleasure seekers and chocolate ice cream lovers. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Almond and White to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Searching for a vegan alternative? Our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Magnum Mini Classic Ice Cream Sticks: velvety smooth vanilla ice cream wrapped in a cracking Magnum chocolate coating - a miniature version of a timeless classic

  • These mini vanilla ice creams are coated with creamy Magnum milk chocolate for a superior taste and texture

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between chocolate and ice cream in a mini size - for indulgence any time

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream is flavoured with velvety vanilla - may contain wheat, gluten, peanuts and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 6 Magnum Mini Classic ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

long_description:
Goodbye serious, hello joy! Bursting with juicy freshness, Streets Cyclone Ice Blocks feature a refreshing swirl of three delicious fruit flavours - peach, pineapple and blueberry! Made with real apple juice, these are a great treat for the kids. Available in an 8 pack, they're easy to share with family and friends on a hot day or as a fun snack anytime. Store at -18°C to enjoy whenever you're craving a sweet fix. Treat yourself to a Cyclone Ice Block today! Between World War I and World War II, Edwin (‘Ted') Street, together with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice creams were originally made in Ted Streets' backyard shed and sold to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then later a one-horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. The business continued to grow, and today, Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Choose happier together with Streets. Visit our website to find our full range of products, including ice blocks, ice cream and so much more.
  • Streets Cyclone is an ice block that will blow you away!

  • Enjoy a refreshing swirl of three delicious fruit flavours: peach, pineapple and blueberry

  • Made with real apple juice, Cyclone Ice Blocks are a fun snack that kids (and not only kids!) will love

  • With its exciting colours, playful shape and irresistible flavours, each ice block is a source of pure joy and endless fun

  • Available in a multipack of 8, these ice blocks are perfect for sharing or keeping in the freezer

  • Store these ice blocks at -18C for anytime you're craving a sweet treat with a cool and fruity twist.

Bubble O'Bill is a classic blend of strawberry, chocolate and caramel ice cream, with a mega bubblegum nose, and a bullet hole through his hat. Bubble O Bill is the Aussie icon we have been waiting for. Say goodbye serious and hello joy! This is where we at Streets kiss goodbye to everything serious and put an ice cream smile on your face. A frozen dessert to share and enjoy with friends and family, or simply treat yourself. The perfect snack all year around, only Bubble O Bill can satisfy your craving. Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street, thanks to his wife and brother, laid the foundations (in Corrimal, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice cream was originally made in the back shed by Ted Street. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then a one horsepower motorbike, to sell Streets ice creams. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Choose Happier Together.
  • Childhood nostalgia now comes in a multipack! Bubble O Bill Ice Cream, the Aussie icon we have been waiting for.

  • Say goodbye serious and hello joy with Bubble O'Bill Ice Cream!

  • Bubble O'Bill is a classic blend of strawberry, chocolate and caramel ice cream

  • Australia's favourite cowboy, with a mega bubblegum nose, and a bullet hole through his Ice-Cream hat.

  • The perfect snack all year around, only Bubble O Bill can satisfy your frozen dessert cravings.

  • Family favouirte Ice Cream now comes in a 4 Pack! Four of the biggest bubble gum noses in The West!.

long_description:
Kinder Bueno Classic Chocolate Ice Cream Cones - A Frozen Delight!

Get ready to experience your favorite Kinder Bueno chocolate bar like never before! Introducing the new Kinder Bueno Classic Frozen Dessert Cone, a truly indulgent ice cream treat that brings the iconic taste of Kinder Bueno to the frozen dessert aisle. Each ice cream cone is a masterpiece of flavor and texture, designed to give you a moment of pure enjoyment with every single bite. Perfect for a refreshing twist on a beloved classic, these ice cream cones are a must-try for any ice cream lover! Treat yourself to the ultimate ice cream cone experience with Kinder Bueno Classic Frozen Dessert Cones.

  • CREAMY HAZELNUT COCOA FILLING: Dive into a luscious, smooth hazelnut cocoa ice cream filling that captures the signature Kinder Bueno taste you adore.

  • TASTY HAZELNUT DISK & CRISPY SPRINKLES: Each cone is topped with a delicious hazelnut disk and crunchy cocoa sprinkles, adding an extra layer of texture and flavor to your frozen dessert.

  • CRUNCHY WAFER CONE: Enjoy the satisfying crunch of a crispy wafer cone, providing the perfect contrast to the creamy ice cream inside.

  • SIGNATURE HAZELNUT & COCOA TIP: Discover a delightful hazelnut and cocoa tip at the bottom of every ice cream cone, ensuring a flavorful finish to your ice cream experience.

  • PERFECT FOR SHARING: Each pack contains 4 delicious ice cream cones, making them ideal for sharing with friends and family during gatherings, parties, or simply when you want to share a moment of ice cream bliss.
name: Bueno Classic Frozen Dessert Cones 4 Pack

long_description:
Here's to Byron Bay: our home and muse since 1895. The natural, beauty & purity of this region is why our ice cream is creamier, bountiful and more crave-worthy—and why you can taste hints of the hinterland, sea breezes and sun-drenched beaches in every blissful bite.

Inspired by the generosity of this coastline, our flavours brim with decadent textures, swirls and clusters that complement our heavenly ice cream. Crafted with our famous milk and cream from local farms, every scoop is an invitation to join us in paradise.
  • 100% Australian Farmer Owned

  • Indulgently chunky ice cream

  • Made with local fresh milk and cream

ingredients: Water, reconstituted juices (38%) (apple, pineapple, raspberry), sugar, maltodextrin, food acid (citric), vegetable gum (410), flavours, colours (124, 123, 102)
long_description:
Goodbye serious, hello joy! With Streets Calippo Mini Raspberry & Pineapple Ice Confection, you can enjoy two mouthwatering fruit flavours combined into a mini ice block. Bursting with juicy freshness, it contains more than 30% real apple, pineapple and raspberry juices and is 99% fat free. Available in a 10 pack, these ice blocks are easy to share with family and friends on a hot day or as a fun snack anytime. Store at -18C to enjoy whenever you're craving a sweet fix. Between World War I and World War II, Edwin ('Ted') Street, together with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice creams were originally made in Ted Streets' backyard shed and sold to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then later a one-horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. The business continued to grow, and today, Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Choose happier together with Streets. Visit our website to find our full range of products, including ice blocks, ice cream and so much more.

  • Bring back that summer feeling with Streets Calippo Mini Raspberry & Pineapple Ice Confection

  • Contains more than 30% real apple, pineapple and raspberry juices to deliver a delightful burst of natural flavours

  • This refreshing raspberry and pineapple ice block is a fun snack that kids (and not only kids!) will love

  • Our mini fruit ice confection is vegan friendly and 99% fat free

  • Available in a multipack of 10, our ice blocks are perfect for sharing or keeping in the freezer

  • Store these ice blocks at -18C for anytime you're craving a sweet treat.

long_description:
With an indulgent, superior taste and quality ingredients, Magnum Mini Almond Ice Cream Sticks invite you to let go and savour layers of decadent pleasure with every bite. The crunch of specially selected Australian almonds, the premium cracking Magnum milk chocolate coating and its silky smooth vanilla ice cream interior work in harmony to give you the perfect balance of texture and taste. All the delicious essentials of a full-sized Magnum Almond ice cream, served as a perfect miniature. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Classic and White to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Searching for a vegan alternative? Our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect vegan frozen dessert. Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Magnum Mini Almond Ice Cream Sticks: velvety ice cream covered in cracking Magnum chocolate and crunchy almond pieces, served in a perfect miniature

  • These mini vanilla ice creams are coated in creamy Magnum milk chocolate, studded with almonds for a superior taste and texture

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium chocolate and ice cream in a mini size - for indulgence any time

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this ice cream is encrusted with carefully selected Australian almonds for that extra delightful crunch - may contain other nuts, wheat and gluten

  • Pack contains 6 Magnum Mini Almond ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

Here at Magnum, we believe that a day without pleasure is a day lost. With Magnum Classic Ice Cream Sticks, experience the rich cracking chocolate and velvety smooth vanilla ice cream any pleasure seeker will adore. Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this indulgent ice cream is coated in creamy milk chocolate made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - a winning combination for pleasure seekers and chocolate ice cream lovers. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's all about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of ice creams, from the delicious Magnum Almond and White to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego. Have you tried the other Magnum ranges? Indulge in a tasty snack with Magnum Mini ice cream. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Finally, our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Which ice cream will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Magnum Classic Ice Cream Sticks - experience the true pleasure and superior taste of velvety smooth ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum chocolate

  • Smooth vanilla ice cream coated in cracking milk chocolate, these ice cream sticks are made from the highest quality ingredients by expert hands with passion and precision

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium chocolate and ice cream - the essential Magnum experience

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream is flavoured with velvety vanilla - may contain wheat, gluten, peanuts and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 4 Magnum Classic ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

ingredients: Milk Chocolate Coating (29%) [Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifier (Lecithin (Soy), 476), Natural Flavour], Dairy Ingredients (Cream and/or Milk Fat, Reconstituted Skim Milk, Milk Solids), Water, Sugar, Baked Brownie Pieces (9.5%) [Sugar, Coconut Oil, Wheat Flour, Cocoa Powder, Brown Sugar, Whole Egg, Humectant (422), Modified Tapioca Startch (1442), Raising Agent (500(ii)), Natural Flavour], Choc Fudge Ripple (7%) [Sugar, Water, Glucose Syrup, Humectant (422), Skim Milk Powder, Vegetable Fat (Coconut), Cocoa Powder, Thickener (440), Salt, Natural Flavours], Choc Flake (4%) [Sugar, Vegetable Fat, Cocoa Powder, Milk Solids, Emulsifiers (Soy Lecithin, 322), Natural Flavour], Cocoa Powder (1%), Emulsifiers (471), Vegetable Gums (410, 412).
long_description:
Here's to Byron Bay: our home and muse since 1895. The natural, beauty and purity of this region is why our ice cream is creamier, bountiful and more crave-worthy - and why you can taste hints of the hinterland, sea breezes and sun-drenched beaches in every blissful bite.

Inspired by the generosity of this coastline, our flavours brim with decadent textures, swirls and clusters that complement our heavenly ice cream. Crafted with our famous milk and cream from local farms, every scoop is an invitation to join us in paradise.
  • 100% Australian Farmer Owned

  • Indulgently chunky ice cream

  • Made with fresh local milk & cream

long_description:
Swirls of tangy exotic sauce swirled in creamy vanilla coated in exotic fruit sorbet.Get that fruity feeling with a Solero Exotic frozen dessert. Indulge in the refreshing taste of exotic fruits, such as peach, passion fruit, mango and pineapple. With only 98 calories per stick and no artificial colours or flavours and , you can enjoy it completely guilt free. And with three to a box, you'll have enough to share with friends. If you're looking for a fruity treat or a refreshing dessert, nothing can beat a Solero. Solero is part of the Streets ice cream family which also includes Cyclone, Paddle Pop, Calippo and Twister. If you like Solero Exotic, why not try Solero Berry Bliss? Make sure to try our Solero ice creams today to experience the great fruity taste for yourself!
  • Solero Exotic is a delicious combination of vanilla with an exotic fruit sorbet swirl and coating

  • Solero Exotic - a fruit lover's dream. A mix of peach, pineapple, and passionfruit. Escape with the refreshingly indulgent combination of creamy vanilla and tropical sorbet.

  • Contains just 98 calories per ice cream

  • Made with over 20% real fruit

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • This frozen dessert comes in a convenient pack of 3, perfect for sharing or keeping to yourself - store at -18C..

long_description:
Step into a world of excitement and fun with Paddle Pop Chocolate Ice Confection, an Aussie classic made with wholesome dairy milk for a delicious source of calcium. Free from artificial colours, give this frozen dessert to the kids or take a trip down memory lane for a taste of chocolate flavoured nostalgia. Available in a pack of eight refreshing Paddle Pops for the family to enjoy on a hot day or as a fun snack anytime. Treat yourself to a Paddle Pop today!

At Paddle Pop, we believe in wholesome childhood fun! Our mission is to craft great ice cream that empowers parents and caregivers to make better choices while bringing happiness, joy and excitement to their kids.

As part of our 'Responsibly Made for Kids' promise, Chocolate Paddle Pop is a fun and tasty treat that meets our nutritional criteria for children's frozen desserts. We have set strict nutrition criteria for all of our kids' ice confections to reassure parents that our entire kids' range will contain no more than 110 calories, a maximum of 12 grams of sugar and 3 grams of saturated fat per portion. Head on over to our website to find out more information on Streets' commitment to nutrition, and discover our full range of products. With brands like Paddle Pop, Magnum, Cornetto and Calippo, there's something for everyone to enjoy.
  • Bring joy to your day with Paddle Pop Chocolate Ice Confection

  • Bite into the brilliant chocolate flavoured dessert today!

  • This frozen dessert is made with Australian or New Zealand dairy

  • Responsibly made for kids, Chocolate Paddle Pops contain no artificial colours and are a delicious source of calcium

  • Our chocolate flavoured ice confection is a fun snack that brings joy and togetherness in every bite

  • This frozen dessert comes in a convenient pack of 8, perfect for sharing or keeping in the freezer - store at -18C for a sweet fix anytime.

long_description:
The unique and refined pleasure of Ferrero Rocher, now in a smooth hazelnut-flavoured frozen creation, enriched with a delightful hazelnut and cocoa swirl, dipped in a rich coating of milk chocolate, and masterfully roasted crunchy hazelnut pieces.

It's a sublime hazelnut experience and refined pleasure of Ferrero Rocher. Perfect for a moment of indulgent relaxation, shared with your close ones or for a me moment.

  • QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Each frozen dessert is a masterpiece, enriched with a delightful hazelnut and cocoa swirl, generously dipped in a rich coating of premium milk chocolate, and adorned with masterfully roasted, crunchy hazelnut pieces. It's a symphony of textures and flavours.

  • UNFORGETTABLE TASTE: Prepare for a sublime hazelnut experience that delivers the iconic, refined pleasure of Ferrero Rocher in every single bite. It's the ultimate frozen dessert indulgence.

  • PERFECTLY INDULGENT: Whether you're seeking a moment of personal bliss or a delightful sweet treat to share with loved ones, these frozen desserts are perfect for any occasion. Elevate your 'me time' or make any gathering extra special with these luxurious frozen creations.

  • MORE FROZEN DESSERT DELIGHTS TO DISCOVER: Don't stop at Ferrero Rocher! Explore our other exciting frozen dessert innovations. Drift away with Raffaello Frozen dessert, a blissful blend of exotic flavors and gentle, creamy textures. There's a frozen treat for every palate.

description: MAGNUM ICE CREAM ALMOND 4PK:.:428 ML
ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients (reconstituted buttermilk milk and/or reconstituted skim milk, milk solids, cream milk), sugar, cocoa components (9%)(cocoa butter^, cocoa mass^), almond, glucose, vegetable oil, emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, lecithin soy, sunflower and/or rapeseed), stabilisers (locust bean gum, tara gum, guar gum, carrageenan), natural vanilla, flavours, colour (annatto), pea protein, salt, maltodextrin, gluco fibre.
long_description:
Discover Magnum Almond Ice Cream Sticks: velvety smooth vanilla ice cream wrapped in cracking Magnum chocolate and topped with crunchy roasted almonds - a unique kind of pleasure that connects you with your playful side. With an indulgent, superior taste and quality ingredients, this ice cream invites you to let go and savour layers of decadent pleasure with every bite. The crunch of specially selected Australian almonds, the premium cracking Magnum milk chocolate coating, and its silky smooth vanilla ice cream interior work in harmony to give you the perfect balance of texture and taste. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum ice cream. Magnum boasts a wide range of frozen desserts, from the delicious Magnum Classic and White to the luxurious Magnum Honeycomb Crunch and Double Caramel Ego ice creams. Have you tried the other Magnum ranges? Indulge in a tasty snack with Magnum Mini ice cream. Looking for the perfect night-in companion? Treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub. Finally, our velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams are the perfect indulgent vegan treat. Which ice cream will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure.
  • Magnum Almond Ice Cream Sticks - experience the true pleasure and superior taste of velvety ice cream covered in cracking Magnum chocolate and crunchy almond pieces

  • Smooth vanilla ice cream coated in rich, cracking milk chocolate studded with almonds, this ice cream is made by expert hands from the highest quality ingredients

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium milk chocolate and ice cream - the essential Magnum experience

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • Flavoured with velvety vanilla, this ice cream is encrusted with carefully selected Australian almonds for that extra delightful crunch (may contain other nuts, wheat and gluten)

  • Pack contains 4 Magnum Almond ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

description: NORCO CAPE BYRON CLASSIC COOKIE DOUGH ICE CREAM STICKS 4 PACK 380ML
ingredients: Milk Chocolate Coating (30%) [Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifier (Lecithin (Soy), 476), Natural Flavour], Dairy Ingredients (Cream and/or Milk Fat, Reconstituted Skim Milk, Milk Solids), Water, Sugar, Cookie Dough Pieces (8%) [Wheat Flour, Brown Sugar, Icing Sugar (Sugar, Tapioca Starch), Coconut Oil, Water, Salt, Emulsifier (322 (Soy)), Raising Agent (500(ii)), Baking Soda (500), Natural Flavour], Choc Fudge Ripple (7%) [Sugar, Water, Glucose Syrup, Humectant (422), Skim Milk Powder, Vegetable Fat (Coconut), Cocoa Powder, Thickener (440), Salt, Natural Flavours], Choc Biscuit Crumb (7%) [Wheat Flour, Sugar, Canola Oil, Cocoa Powder, Malt Extract (Barley), Glucose Syrup, Raising Agent (Sodium Bicarbonate), Salt], Emulsifier (471), Vegetable Gums (410, 412), Natural Flavour, Natural Colour (Carotene)
long_description:
Here's to Byron Bay: our home and muse since 1895. The natural, beauty & purity of this region is why our ice cream is creamier, bountiful and more crave-worthy—and why you can taste hints of the hinterland, sea breezes and sun-drenched beaches in every blissful bite.

Your vacation for the senses. Deliciously creamy vanilla ice cream with superbly chewy cookie dough chunks and crumbly chocolate biscuit piece with rivers of luscious chocolate sauce enveloped in a milk choc and biscuit crumb coat. Every mouthful whisking you away to where you'd rather be.

Inspired by the generosity of this coastline, our flavours brim with decadent textures, swirls and clusters that complement our heavenly ice cream. Crafted with our famous milk and cream from local farms, every scoop is an invitation to join us in paradise.
  • 100% Australian Farmer Owned

  • Indulgently chunky ice cream

  • Made with fresh local milk and cream

ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients (reconstituted buttermilk and/or reconstituted skim milk, cream, milk fat), sugar, cocoa components (6.9%^) (cocoa butter), passionfruit juice concentrate (6%), glucose, toasted coconut, vegetable oil, emulsifiers (mono/diglycerides of fatty acids, sunflower lecithin, polyglycerol polyricinoleate), flavours, stabilisers (guar gum, locust bean gum, carrageenan, tara gum), citric acid, colours (turmeric, annatto).
long_description:
Discover Magnum Passionfruit White Chocolate Ice Cream. From the first crack to the very last bite, all five senses experience the superior and indulgent taste of velvety vanilla custard-flavoured ice cream with a tangy passionfruit swirl, all dipped in Magnum's white chocolate coating encrusted with toasted coconut pieces. Our chocolate is made with the highest-quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - a winning combination for pleasure seekers and chocolate lovers. Excellence is achieved when you care about every detail. That's why we select the most exclusive ingredients and expert hands to create every one of our products with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to make sure our products are made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Our cocoa beans have a long way to go before they become Magnum chocolate. It's all about quality and sustainability throughout every step of the journey. Since 1989, pleasure seekers around the world have been discovering Magnum desserts. Taste the pleasures of the world with our Destinations range, expertly curated to bring the most exciting, indulgent flavours to those looking to rediscover the world. From Amsterdam Chocolate & Cookie Butter to New York Chocolate Cheesecake, from Las Vegas Caramelised Chocolate & Cookie to Tahiti, which one will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, free yourself and be #TrueToPleasure. Thinking about a delicious chocolate gift for your friends or family? With our chocolate expertise and high quality ingredients, Magnum is the perfect treat!
  • Discover Magnum Passionfruit White Chocolate Ice Cream Sticks capturing the passion of a tropical summer in every bite

  • Velvety smooth vanilla custard-flavoured ice cream with a delicious passionfruit swirl, coated in thick white chocolate and toasted coconut pieces

  • Those seeking pure pleasure will love these ice cream sticks, striking the perfect balance between premium chocolate and tropical flavours - the essential Magnum experience

  • The chocolate used in our ice cream is made with the highest-quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance - guaranteed to satisfy every chocolate lover

  • This ice cream is flavoured with coconut and passionfruit; may contain wheat, gluten, soy, peanut and tree nuts

  • Pack contains 4 Magnum Passionfruit White Chocolate ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

description: WEIS 4PK BARS FROZEN:MACADAMIA MANGOS CR:.:280 ML
ingredients: Water, mango (27%), sugar, cream (milk), macadamia (5%), milk solids, coconut milk powder, glucose syrup, citric acid, guar gum, locust bean gum, vanilla extract, natural colours (annatto, beet red).
long_description:
Weis Macadamia, Mango & Ice Cream Bars are a moreish combination of delicious macadamia nuts, real Australian Kensington Pride mangoes and our creamy Weis ice cream. We use only the best-tasting mangoes and roasted macadamias for a great taste that will send you nutty!

Our classic two-toned Weis bars are already a truly irresistible treat, but add deliciously crunchy macadamias to our classic real fruit and cream strip combo, and you've got heaven in a Weis bar.

Weis bars are the perfect summer escape at any time of the year - all wrapped up in a no-stick, no-drip package. They contain no artificial colours or flavours and are gluten free, so you can enjoy every bite. Our frozen desserts are a real summer favourite and perfect for hot days, sweet treats or really any occasion. There is nothing quite like that real Weis flavour!

At Weis, our knowledge and expertise in sourcing and working with all different kinds of fruits, premium-grade nuts and natural ingredients enables us to create unique combinations and give you a tonne of sunshine in every bite. Be sure to also try our Weis Mini Mango & Ice Cream Bars for a moment of magic.
  • Weis Macadamia, Mango & Ice Cream Bars are made with delicious Aussie mangoes

  • These bars contain crunchy macadamia nuts and real Aussie dairy for a great flavour

  • Weis ice cream bars are perfect for a hot summer's day or just as a sweet treat

  • No artificial colours or flavours so you can enjoy every bite

  • Each ice cream bar is only 163 calories, making them a truly irresistible snack

  • Weis bars have been made right here in Australia since 1957.

description: MAGNUM ICE CREAM HONEYCOMB CRUNCH 4PK 428ML
ingredients: Ingredients: Dairy ingredients (reconstituted buttermilk milk and/or reconstituted skim milk, milk solids, cream milk), sugar, cocoa components (9%)(cocoa butter^, cocoa mass^), glucose, vegetable oil, flavours, emulsifiers (mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids, lecithin soy, sunflower and/or rapeseed), stabilisers (guar gum, locust bean gum, tara gum, carrageenan), colours (malt extract from barley, annatto), raising agent (bicarbonate soda), salt, maltodextrin, gluco fibre.
long_description:
Introducing Magnum Honeycomb Crunch Ice Cream Sticks, a delectable dessert that boasts honeycomb-flavoured ice cream with real honeycomb pieces coated with a thick layer of Magnum chocolate that will crack with every bite. The chocolate coating is made with the highest quality, 100% sustainable cocoa beans certified by the Rainforest Alliance. The honeycomb ice cream, chocolate coating and honeycomb crunch all work together to create a perfect balance of texture and taste. At Magnum, we take pride in every detail of our products, so we use only the most exclusive ingredients and skilled hands to create them with passion and precision. We work closely with the Rainforest Alliance to ensure our ingredients are responsibly sourced and sustainable. Our cocoa beans go through an extensive journey before they become Magnum chocolate, and we prioritise quality and sustainability at every step. Since 1989, Magnum has been pleasing taste buds worldwide with a wide range of ice cream flavours, including the classic Magnum Classic and Almond and the luxurious Magnum Double Caramel Ego. For a quick indulgence, try Magnum Mini ice cream sticks, or treat yourself to a decadent Magnum ice cream tub for the perfect night-in companion. We also offer velvety Magnum Dairy Free ice creams, perfect for vegans seeking an indulgent treat. With so many options, which Magnum ice cream will satisfy your indulgence? Explore more Magnum frozen treats, and let yourself be #TrueToPleasure.
  • Magnum Honeycomb Ice Cream Sticks, smooth and creamy honeycomb ice cream coated in our cracking Magnum milk chocolate shell with honeycomb pieces

  • The perfect balance of thick cracking Magnum chocolate and honeycomb pieces to satisfy those seeking pure pleasure

  • Made from our highest quality cocoa beans, sustainably grown and carefully selected for a delicious family treat

  • Enjoy Rainforest Alliance-certified Magnum chocolate dessert ice cream, available in classic and unique flavours for the whole family to savour

  • Magnum chocolate dessert ice cream is made from our highest quality cocoa beans, sustainably grown and carefully selected to deliver unique chocolate flavours to you

  • Pack contains 4 Magnum Honeycomb ice creams to be stored at -18C - the perfect way to share the pleasure, any time.

description: STREETS GOLDEN GAYTIME BIRTHDAY CAKE STICKS 4 PACK 400ML
ingredients: Dairy ingredients reconstituted buttermilk (milk) and/or reconstituted skim milk, milk solids, cream (milk), sugar, vegetable oil, glucose syrup, wheat flour, flavours, colours 133, 160b, 161b, 120, malt extract (barley), gelatin, emulsifiers (471, soy lecithin, 476), cocoa, salt, raising agent (500), vegetable gums (401, 407, 410, 417, 412).
long_description:
It's difficult to have a Gaytime on your own, so share the celebration with friends and family! Let us introduce you to Australia's party host for Streets Ice Cream's 100th Birthday Celebration - Golden Gaytime Birthday Cake! Enjoy birthday cake flavoured ice cream, dipped in delicious chocolate and covered in the first ever multi colour crumb with pink, blue, and yellow vanilla biscuit crumbs. That's what we call a celebration! Between World War 1 and World War 2, Edwin ('Ted') Street, with the help of his wife and brother, laid the foundations (in Corrimal, NSW) for what would ultimately become Australia's biggest and best-known ice cream manufacturer. Streets ice cream was originally made in the back shed by Ted Street. He would then sell these to neighbours along with sweets, cakes and lemonade. Popularity grew, and he soon used a cart, then a one horsepower motorbike to sell Streets ice cream. It continued to grow and today Streets ice cream is sold throughout Australia and New Zealand with well-known brands such as Magnum, Paddle Pop, Cornetto, Gaytime, Calippo and Blue Ribbon. Gaytime was first made in 1959, although it wasn't until 1970 that the Golden Gaytime was released, becoming an Aussie icon in the process!
  • Golden Gaytime - Australia's favourite ice cream!

  • Birthday cake flavoured ice cream

  • Gaytime Ice Cream covered in the first ever multicolour crumb with pink, blue, and yellow vanilla biscuit crumbs

  • Coated in a thin layer of chocolate, just like the original Gaytime Ice cream!

  • Now every day is your birthday with Gaytime birthday cake Ice-Cream!

  • Golden Gaytime Ice Cream Birthday Cake Available in a multipack.

With only 97 calories per stick and no artificial colours or flavours and, you can enjoy it completely guilt free. And with three to a box, you'll have enough to share with friends. If you're looking for a fruity treat or a refreshing dessert, nothing can beat a Solero. Solero is part of the Streets ice cream family which also includes Cyclone, Paddle Pop, Calippo and Twister. If you like Solero Berry Bliss, why not try Solero Exotic? Make sure to try our Solero ice creams today to experience the great fruity taste for yourself!

long_description:
Paddle Pop Twister Tropical Mini Ice Cream Lolly makes for a delicious and quick frozen dessert - a firm favourite with both young and old. The plant-based creamy vanilla outer layer is twisted with refreshing tropical, mango and pineapple fruit ice - a treat with a twist! What's more, each mini ice cream contains just 44 calories per serve and is made with no artifical colours and flavours, and fruit juice using a gluten-free recipe. The perfect ice block for an after-school snack or on a hot summer's day, loved by little ones and appreciated by older ones. Twister is part of the Paddle Pop Streets family, along with Cyclone, Calippo, Splice and Weis.wister
  • Looking for a frozen dessert with refreshing pineapple, juicy peach and tangy passion fruit-mango mix in an ice block? You're in the right place!

  • Enjoy this mini ice cream with its smooth vanilla plant-based outer layer, twisted with refreshing tropical flavour fruit ice, and a pineapple fruit ice core

  • Made with no artificial colours and flavours, fruit juice with a gluten-free recipe, these ice blocks are bursting with juicy freshness

  • At only 44 calories per serve, they are a perfect snack to grab on the go

  • Our ice block treats make for an irresistible afternoon snack to cool down on a hot summer's day

  • The classic Twister shape in a mini size in a convenient pack of 6 - the perfect frozen dessert for sharing or keeping in the freezer.
