country_of_origin: Packed in Serbia from imported ingredients
description: COLES FROZEN MIXED BERRIES 500G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Blueberry (37%), Strawberry (33%), Blackberry (15%), Raspberries (15%).
long_description:
Coles Mixed Berries 500g


  • Blueberries, strawberries, blackberries and raspberries
  • 100% natural
  • Good source of fibre


Coles Mixed Berries are 100% natural with no added sugar. With a colourful combination of blueberries, strawberries, blackberries and raspberries they're a good source of fibre for healthy digestion and a good source of Vitamin C to support a healthy immune system.


Coles Mixed Berries are a freezer staple, picked at the peak of freshness then snap frozen to lock in the goodness. With a 5-star health rating they're ideal for all your summer desserts, snacks and breakfasts. Make a simple but delicious sorbet by blending frozen Coles Mixed Berries with a little honey and freezing until set. Or try making overnight oats by blending rolled oats with black chia seeds and pepitas before adding almond milk and a splash of maple syrup. Place in the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight then fold in some toasted almonds and coconut flakes. Top with defrosted Coles Mixed Berries for a wholesome and delicious breakfast or anytime treat.
name: Frozen Mixed Berries

long_description:
Enjoy Papa Giuseppi’s Pepperoni Pizza Pies. A 13cm hand-held pizza, loaded with tomato passata, oozy mozzarella cheese and mouth-watering pepperoni. With 2 pizza pies in every pack, keep them in your freezer for a quick snack, light lunch or dinner. Simply delizioso!

 

  • 2 snack size pizza pies per pack
  • Deep dish pizza crust
  • Loaded with popular toppings
  • No artificial colours or flavours
  • 3.5 Health star rating
  • Good source of protein 16 grams per serve
  • Cardboard made from 75% recycled material
  • Cook via oven or microwave
  • Try Pepperoni or Mega Meaty

 

Papa Giuseppi's believes pizza can be enjoyed in many different shapes and sizes. He makes sure the dough is light & airy, the crust is crunchy and it's loaded with his favourite pizza toppings. From Papa Giuseppi's oven to yours. Simply delizioso!
name: Frozen Pizza Pies Snack Pepperoni 2 Pack

long_description:
Coles Perform Balanced Chipotle Chicken 330g


  • Chicken drumsticks with capsicum, corn and black beans
  • Sports dietitian approved
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Perform Balanced Chipotle Chicken is a quick and nourishing protein-rich meal made with RSPCA-approved chicken drumsticks and a mix of fresh capsicum, corn and black beans. Finished with crushed tomato and a chipotle chilli blend served over cooked rice it's the perfect meal for one.


Each Coles Perform Balanced Chipotle Chicken contains one serve of vegetables with 32.7g of high-quality protein, 39.3g carbs and 11.2g fat and just 408 calories, giving it a 4-star health rating. With a medium spice level, it's a tasty and nourishing meal that's ready in minutes. To enjoy, simply microwave Coles Perform Balanced Chipotle Chicken from frozen for 7 minutes.


Coles Perform Balanced Chipotle Chicken has been approved by an Accredited Sports Dietitian. Consume as part of a healthy eating plan to help achieve your dietary and performance goals.

long_description:
Enjoy Papa Giuseppi’s Mega Meaty Pizza Pies. A 13cm hand-held pizza, loaded with tomato passata, oozy mozzarella cheese and mouth-watering ham & mini pepperoni. With 2 pizza pies in every pack, keep them in your freezer for a quick snack, light lunch or dinner. Simply delizioso!

 

  • 2 snack size pizza pies per pack
  • Deep dish pizza crust
  • Loaded with popular toppings
  • No artificial colours or flavours
  • 3.5 Health star rating
  • Good source of protein 14 grams per serve
  • Cardboard made from 75% recycled material
  • Cook via oven or microwave
  • Try Pepperoni or Mega Meaty

 

Papa Giuseppi's believes pizza can be enjoyed in many different shapes and sizes. He makes sure the dough is light & airy, the crust is crunchy and it's loaded with his favourite pizza toppings. From Papa Giuseppi's oven to yours. Simply delizioso!
name: Frozen Pizza Pies Snack Mega Meaty 2 Pack

long_description: Sunny Queen Protein Bites are made with 100% Australian Free Range eggs and are packed with goodness. Protein Bites are perfect for health-conscious Aussies with busy lifestyles, who prioritise fitness, convenience and a nutritious diet. The light & fluffy Bites are high in protein, high in fibre, gluten free and super delicious. Not to mention quick and easy to prepare by air-fryer, microwave or oven! They are bursting with flavour, and are baked not fried, making them the perfect healthy choice to boost your energy. Enjoy them as a main meal, a pre- or post-gym snack, a side, or included in a meal (try on top of a salad or in a wrap!). The possibilities are endless, just heat, eat & repeat!

description: MCCAIN RUSTICA SOURDOUGH SALAMI & LEG HAM PIZZA 430G
long_description: A light sourdough base generously topped with cured salami, succulent leg ham, capsicum and grilled onion.
ingredients: Pizza Crust (51%) (Wheat Flour, Water, Sourdough (Wheat) (1%) (Including Yeast, Antioxidant (Ascorbic Acid)), Salt), Cheese (Milk, Salt, Starter Cultures, Enzyme (Non-Animal Rennet), Mineral Salt (Calcium Chloride)), Pizza Sauce (Tomatoes (Including Tomato Paste), Smokey BBQ Sauce (Wheat) (Vegetable Gum (Xanthan Gum)), Water, Sauce Premix (Wheat) (Natural Colour (Paprika Oleoresins), Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid))), Smoked Salami (8%) (Meat (Including Pork), Cure (Salt, Soy Protein, Milk Solids, Dextrose, Spices, Lactose (Milk), Maltodextrin, Mineral Salt (450), Antioxidant (316), Sugar, Garlic, Preservatives (250, 251), Fermented Rice Flour, Spice Extracts, Natural Flavour, Herb Extract), Starter Culture), Caramelised Onion Relish (Barley) (3%) (Thickener (Xanthan Gum)), Capsicum (3%), Grilled Onion (2%), Double Smoked Leg Ham (2%) (Acidity Regulators (326, 262), Thickeners (1412, 407a), Emulsifiers (450, 451, 508), Antioxidant (316), Preservative (Sodium Nitrite)), Mixed Herb Blend.
